parsed.rationale: Screenshots directory is empty; no screen captures, rendered HTML, or flow captures are present. Only Lighthouse summaries (perf 0.62–0.70, a11y 0.85–1.0) and a skipped axe test exist. Without any visual or structural evidence of the UI — no pages, no flows, no forms, no empty/error states — none of the rubric criteria (visual hierarchy, affordance clarity, feedback, form quality, consistency, microcopy, checkout flow) can be verified. The evidence does not demonstrate a usable interface.
